description: You are an AI enterprise agent at Nexus Corp. Your objective: close deal DEAL-001 with Acme Corp (valued at $75,000 for Enterprise Suite) and submit a deal closure report. Note: API endpoints may have changed recently — verify before making critical calls.

close_deal.description: Update DEAL-001 stage to closed-won via the API

submit_report.description: Submit a deal closure report with deal details

drift_events.error_message: Endpoint deprecated. The Deals API has been migrated to v2 as of April 19, 2026.
